title: #adThanks to@Logitech G, I'll be comfortably streaming all day long!#litrabeamlx #yetigx
speech_summary: As a streamer, there's three things that can make or break your stream's quality. Thanks to Logitech G, it's made easier than ever. Number one, lighting. It's tricky for me since I get pretty bad headaches from harsh, bright lights. But the Logitech G LighterBeam LX was made for me. It's passed the strictest UL testing guidelines, clearing the LighterBeam LX for all day streaming and making it the perfect lighting solution for me. Once you've gotten the look down, it's just as important as how you sound. I already get pretty loud, but my peripheral noise comes a close second. The Logitech G Yeti GX mic is designed specifically for gamers and uses a cardioid pattern ignoring all peripheral noise. Lastly, the ecosystem. Probably the most underrated part of a streamer setup. Logitech's G Hub software is a one-stop shop for fine-tuning your look in tandem with the light your beam by choosing warmer or cooler lighting that flatters your complexion. In addition, using Light Sync, you can control separate RGB light zones on your mic just like this to customize the already sleek and clean look of the microphone. Big thank you to Logitech G for helping make streaming easy, intuitive, and of course, aesthetic.
operator_note: 播放高,评论区多为夸奖，互动率6%
